title: Discontinued Features
description: Use the items Mojang doesn't want you to have.
body:
## Discontinued Features is a work in progress.

Classic crafting recipes like the enchanted golden apple and chainmail have been resurrected! Includes a vast array of colorful wool, alpha & beta blocks, debug/developer elements, and ported features from other editions I guarantee you haven't seen before.

Inspired by the now-abandoned [Rediscovered](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rediscovered) mod, this is a spiritual successor built using MCreator. I have many ideas for expanding the project and would welcome collaboration from experienced modders. Every item in this mod was either part of official development or hinted at and can be found on the [MCDF](https://mcdf.wiki.gg/wiki/Minecraft_Discontinued_Features_Wiki)—this project wouldn’t be possible without their work. Eventually, I would like this mod to culminate in a combination of all Minecraft versions: Bedrock, Earth, Pocket, Education, and April Fools.

##

![BlockSprites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b1130b1da75005665712ed5682727e552e685cf.png)

### Please let me know if you have any suggestions or advice!
###
